prompt: A 3D printed filament spool holder sits on a bench: a sturdy base with upright arms and a smooth axle ready to cradle a filament spool. Beside it, an entry-level FDM printer is mid-print on a second holder component, with a skirt visible on the build plate. A finished holder in use supports a spool so filament feeds cleanly toward the extruder. The workspace is a neat, solarpunk-style maker area with warm lighting, organized tools, and no logos or readable text.
